purpose: Per-CLAUDE.md `Bash command timing` policy. Rolling history of elapsed times for shell commands the agent runs in this project, plus a learned list of known-slow patterns. The agent consults this before invoking Bash; if a command matches a known-slow pattern (or recent samples exceed SLOW_BASH_THRESHOLD_MS), it auto-delegates to a subagent via the Agent tool instead of blocking the main conversation loop.

samples.note: Approximate — based on observed mycobeta deploy-time test runs across this session
On-host recipe via MYCO_DEPLOY_HOST=kkrazy@localhost; includes test.sh + docker build + container swap + verify_deploy probe
Mostly cached when only deploy.sh / test.sh / web-asset changes land; cold build is closer to 90 s
1.3 MB tarball over residential broadband — well under the threshold

samples.cmd: ssh kkrazy@<host> docker exec myco grep

samples.note: Measured serial run before parallelization — 87 s of node tests + ~20 s static/static-feature + ~10 s server smoke
Post node_test_prelaunch parallelization — long pole now agent-session.test.js (~65 s SDK round-trip) running concurrently with everything else
Real SDK round-trip per phase-1 smoke test; skips if no creds
fs.watch safety-poll exercise needs 12 s of wall-clock
First-time install of the express/ws/uuid stack; subsequent runs reuse the cache

knownSlowPatterns.reason: Full pre-commit suite (path is ./test/test.sh post-td-32; legacy ./test.sh kept in regex so older bash-elapsed.json samples still match). Always delegate when invoked outside a deploy.sh context.
End-to-end deploy: tests + build + swap + verify. Path is ./scripts/deploy.sh post-td-33; legacy ./deploy.sh kept in regex so older bash-elapsed.json samples still match. Always delegate.
Cold build only; cached builds are <5 s. Delegate on first invocation per session.
Under threshold normally; bumps if pushing many commits to a slow remote. Inline is fine.
Source tarball ship to mycobeta/myco. Inline acceptable; delegate only as part of the full deploy chain.
Real SDK round-trip; needs cred + network. When invoked standalone, delegate; the test.sh prelaunch already overlaps it with the other tests.
Cold install ~7-30 s depending on cache + network. Delegate first run; subsequent invocations are usually under 5 s.

config.comment: Update SLOW_BASH_THRESHOLD_MS upward if you observe many 30-40 s commands you'd rather wait inline for; downward if you want more aggressive subagent delegation.
